data.description:
## Summary
Sub-effort (b) of story fatty-cipher-range. Make error_envelope the only machine-readable error channel: every command failure under --output json emits it.

## Shape decision (recorded)
The envelope ALREADY EXISTS: src/rebar/schemas/common.schema.json error_envelope definition (~:89-98; required fields error, input, message). Extend it with OPTIONAL exit_code (integer) — no other shape changes. Do not invent a new schema.

## Scope decisions (recorded)
- Applies ONLY when --output json is requested; text-mode stderr prose unchanged.
- Shape changes land in-window with NO migration shim (zero external consumers); release notes flag it.

## What
- Audit every dispatcher arm's failure path under --output json (work from the 41-arm inventory on bug dotty-ditty-ripen); route non-conforming ones through the shared emitter (ticket_output.sh / ticket_output.py already centralize --output handling — extend there, not per-script).
- tests/interfaces/test_error_envelope.py: per-command failure trigger (missing id is universal) -> output validates against error_envelope.

## Suggested RED test
Parametrized failure test over all --output json commands; RED for each command that emits prose today.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every --output json failure emits schema-valid error_envelope (incl. optional exit_code)
- [ ] Text-mode output byte-identical to before
- [ ] Schema change + release-notes line landed in-window
data.title: Contract freeze (b): error_envelope on every --output json failure path
